privileged_info_summary: The task involves tagging three documents in Nuxeo Platform's Projects workspace: (1) Annual Report 2023 (File, 8 pages) at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023 with tags 'annual-report', 'finance', '2023'; (2) Project Proposal (File, 8 pages) at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Project-Proposal with tags 'proposal', 'project-planning'; (3) Q3 Status Report (Note, created from template) at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Q3-Status-Report with tags 'quarterly-report', '2023', 'status'. All documents are synthetic, created via setup_nuxeo.sh with ReportLab-generated PDFs on 2026-02-22. Document content confirms appropriate tagging: Annual Report contains fiscal year 2023 financial data, Project Proposal describes cloud migration initiative, and Q3 Status Report covers Q3 2023 project status.
